item.title: /* bannator.py: The 44 line Python Script That Blocks Brute Force Attacks (this script introduces you to programming!) */
item.description: Discover bannator.py: a 44 line Python script that blocks brute force attacks on Linux. A practical example of security and coding.

item.title: /* Build Your First Artificial Neuron in C: The Perceptron Made Simple */
item.description: Learn how to build a perceptron in C: your first artificial neuron explained step by step, the foundation of neural networks and machine learning.

item.title: Privacy and cookie policy
item.description: Privacy and cookie policy for the blog: analytics, comments, legal bases, and consent handling.

item.title: /* Coding in Italy: Why Scratch Isn’t Enough (and What Students Really Need) */
item.description: In Italy, coding often means Scratch. Discover why that’s not enough and why real programming languages like C and Python are essential.

item.title: /* The Ultimate ViM Configuration (.vimrc) Every Developer Should Try */
item.description: A practical Vim configuration for developers and sysadmins, refined over years of work on Debian and Unix systems.

item.title: /* Hello World in C: Why Every Programmer Starts Here */
item.description: Learn how to write your first program in C with Hello World: the starting point for every programmer to understand coding logic.

item.title: /* Whoami */
item.description: Profile of Vincenzo Argese: software development, cybersecurity, DFIR, Debian GNU/Linux, and game development.

item.title: Cybersecurity
item.description: Hub page for cybersecurity, log analysis, defensive scripting, and content close to DFIR work.

item.title: Debian GNU/Linux
item.description: Hub page for Debian GNU/Linux, practical tooling, working setups, and posts tied to the operating system behind most of this blog.

item.title: Game Development
item.description: Hub page for game development and game design, intended to collect current and future posts on Godot, Unreal, and prototyping.

item.title: Software Development
item.description: Hub page for software development: C, Python, algorithms, fundamentals, and practical technical projects.
